title: 姐さんのスパルタ式鍛錬

text_block_list.text: Hishi Amazon and I go out for lunch at a buffet.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
Oh, you've got a pretty good spread there! Which sides did you end
up grabbing?

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
Wait, those plate colors look familiar... Is it just me, or do you get the
exact same thing every time we come here?

I explain to her that I always seem to inadvertently pick out the
grilled dishes.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
Geez, I expected better from you, Teach! You can't let yourself fall
into a routine like that!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
That's not how you stay healthy. You gotta quit eating the same ol'
things and broaden those nutritional horizons!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
And working out is just as important. Speaking of, I've actually been
wondering...

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text: You are exercising, right, Teach? You're not making us bust our butts while you sit back and take it easy, are ya?
choice_data_list: I work out a decent amount...

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text: "Decent"? If you think that's enough for a trainer to stay in shape, you're way off base!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
I can't just let this one slide. All right, leave it to ol' Hishiama! I'll get
that bod of yours nice and toned up, or I ain't the leader of the Miho
Dorm!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text: Now, c'mon—follow me!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
We'll start off with some light jogging! But the lesson won't be over
'til you manage to pass me! Ready, set, hyaaaaah!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
What're you walking for? ...Wait, you call that running? You're never
gonna slim down creepin' along at a snail's pace like that.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
Next up is strength training. And I don't mean some half-assed
regimen where you do one set and call it a day. We're talkin' circuit
training!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
Arms, legs, abs! Arms, legs, abs! Just when you think it's time for a
break, we work that back! Show me a bow pose!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
What's with that lousy form? C'mon, you gotta bend more! Can't be a
bow without loops!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
Hey, what're you slacking off for? This is a one-on-one, not a
lie-on-floor!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
Wait, Teach?! Oh, for cryin' out loud. What gives? I've never seen
such a sorry sight.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
Hahaha. Okay, maaaybe I got a little too fired up. Sorry 'bout that,
I'm just wired that way.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
When I help somebody out, I've got to see it through to the very end.
Otherwise it just doesn't sit right with me, y'know?
choice_data_list: You sound like a doting wife.
You sound like a doting wife.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text: A-a wife?! Enough with the mushy stuff! It's not like I'm doing it out of the goodness of my heart.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
I just always wanna take the lead. So I've got no clue what it's like to
run a three-legged race with somebody.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
Even when it comes to you, I still don't really know the right way to
act together and build a friendship.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
I may be a pro at one-on-ones, but this whole hand-in-hand thing is
another story.
choice_data_list: You'll get used to it little by little.
You'll get used to it little by little.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
Little by little, huh? Yeah... Not sure if I can pull it off, but I'll have to
give it a try!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text: After all, the two of us are just getting started!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text: Right on! Hahaha, looks like you've bounced back a bit.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text: And that means... break time is over! Let's get back to the workout.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
Hey, what's with the look of horror? Like I said, once I've decided to
help somebody, I never give up on 'em.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
So lemme see those legs moving! Hahaha, it's hard to tell which one
of us is the trainer at this point. Can't say I mind it though!

Despite being unsure how to match another person's stride and pace,
Amazon nevertheless sets out to run her first proverbial three-legged
race.
